mapper.select: SELECT * FROM floating_registration_application WHERE application_id=#{applicationId}
SELECT * FROM floating_registration_application WHERE application_id=#{applicationId} FOR UPDATE
mapper.update: UPDATE floating_registration_application SET source_region_code=#{v.sourceRegionCode},source_address=#{v.sourceAddress},current_region_code=#{v.currentRegionCode},current_address=#{v.currentAddress},residence_reason_code=#{v.residenceReasonCode},residence_proof_type=#{v.residenceProofType},arrival_date=#{v.arrivalDate},planned_leave_date=#{v.plannedLeaveDate},applicant_phone=#{v.applicantPhone},version=version+1,updated_at=CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE application_id=#{v.applicationId} AND business_status='DRAFT' AND version=#{version}

UPDATE floating_registration_application SET business_status=#{to},operator_id=COALESCE(#{operator},operator_id),executed_floating_id=COALESCE(#{executed},executed_floating_id),executed_at=CASE WHEN #{to}='COMPLETED' THEN CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ELSE executed_at END,version=version+1,updated_at=CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE application_id=#{id} AND business_status=#{from}
mapper.select: SELECT person_id,name,gender,id_card,birth_date,ethnicity,phone,current_address,status,current_status_code,created_at,updated_at FROM person WHERE person_id=#{id}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM residence WHERE person_id=#{personId} AND status='ACTIVE' AND region_code=#{region}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM floating_population WHERE person_id=#{personId} AND current_flag=1 AND status='ACTIVE'
SELECT FROM floating_population f JOIN person p ON p.person_id=f.person_id WHERE f.floating_id=#{id}
SELECT FROM floating_population f JOIN person p ON p.person_id=f.person_id WHERE f.floating_id=#{id} FOR UPDATE
mapper.update: UPDATE floating_population SET status=#{status},close_reason_code=#{reason},closed_at=CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,current_flag=NULL,version=version+1,updated_at=CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE floating_id=#{id} AND status='ACTIVE' AND current_flag=1 AND version=#{version}
mapper.select: SELECT FROM floating_population f JOIN person p ON p.person_id=f.person_id ORDER BY f.created_at DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM floating_population f JOIN person p ON p.person_id=f.person_id
SELECT * FROM residence_permit_application WHERE application_id=#{applicationId}
SELECT * FROM residence_permit_application WHERE application_id=#{applicationId} FOR UPDATE
mapper.update: UPDATE residence_permit_application SET residence_basis_code=#{v.residenceBasisCode},requested_valid_from=#{v.requestedValidFrom},requested_valid_until=#{v.requestedValidUntil},version=version+1,updated_at=CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE application_id=#{v.applicationId} AND business_status='DRAFT' AND version=#{version}

UPDATE residence_permit_application SET business_status=#{to},operator_id=COALESCE(#{operator},operator_id),executed_permit_id=COALESCE(#{executed},executed_permit_id),executed_at=CASE WHEN #{to}='COMPLETED' THEN CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ELSE executed_at END,version=version+1,updated_at=CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE application_id=#{id} AND business_status=#{from}
mapper.select: SELECT FROM residence_permit r JOIN person p ON p.person_id=r.person_id JOIN floating_population f ON f.floating_id=r.floating_id WHERE r.permit_id=#{id}
SELECT FROM residence_permit r JOIN person p ON p.person_id=r.person_id JOIN floating_population f ON f.floating_id=r.floating_id WHERE r.permit_id=#{id} FOR UPDATE

SELECT FROM residence_permit r JOIN person p ON p.person_id=r.person_id JOIN floating_population f ON f.floating_id=r.floating_id WHERE r.person_id=#{personId} AND r.status='ACTIVE' AND r.current_flag=1

SELECT FROM residence_permit r JOIN person p ON p.person_id=r.person_id JOIN floating_population f ON f.floating_id=r.floating_id WHERE r.floating_id=#{floatingId} AND r.status='ACTIVE' AND r.current_flag=1
mapper.update: UPDATE residence_permit SET valid_until=#{newUntil},last_endorsed_at=CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,version=version+1,updated_at=CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE permit_id=#{id} AND status='ACTIVE' AND valid_until=#{oldUntil} AND version=#{version}

UPDATE residence_permit SET status='CANCELLED',cancellation_reason=#{reason},cancelled_at=CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,current_flag=NULL,version=version+1,updated_at=CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE permit_id=#{id} AND status='ACTIVE' AND current_flag=1 AND version=#{version}
UPDATE residence_permit SET status='EXPIRED',current_flag=NULL,version=version+1,updated_at=CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE permit_id=#{id} AND status='ACTIVE' AND current_flag=1 AND version=#{version}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM residence_permit_log WHERE permit_id=#{permitId} ORDER BY operation_time,permit_log_id
SELECT FROM residence_permit r JOIN person p ON p.person_id=r.person_id JOIN floating_population f ON f.floating_id=r.floating_id ORDER BY r.created_at DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM residence_permit r JOIN person p ON p.person_id=r.person_id JOIN floating_population f ON f.floating_id=r.floating_id

SELECT FROM residence_permit r JOIN person p ON p.person_id=r.person_id JOIN floating_population f ON f.floating_id=r.floating_id WHERE r.status='ACTIVE' AND r.valid_until BETWEEN #{from} AND #{to} ORDER BY r.valid_until
SELECT FROM residence_permit r JOIN person p ON p.person_id=r.person_id JOIN floating_population f ON f.floating_id=r.floating_id WHERE r.status='ACTIVE' AND r.valid_until<#{today}
SELECT FROM floating_population f JOIN person p ON p.person_id=f.person_id WHERE f.status='ACTIVE' AND f.planned_leave_date<#{today}
